description: Style NoteThe first limited edition of the boss Orange fragrance for women donated one profit share to UNICEF. This edition has become widely popular since then, best recommended for light summery occasions. Product DetailsThe accords are juicy and characteristic notes of apple, creamy white flowers, orange blossom, vanilla, olive wood and sandalwood.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
